description: S8/B10 edit own profile, statusMessage leg (coverage-widening, hermetic): set the account's own status message via l3_set_self_profile and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.statusMessage. statusMessage rides the real FfiChatService.updateSelfProfile + Prefs.setStatusMessage path with the nickname PRESERVED (so the test-account nickname guard stays valid — nickname is intentionally NOT touched). codex P2: the gate ENFORCES an empty-status START invariant (first step asserts statusMessage=='') so restoring to '' is a FAITHFUL restore, not a hard-coded guess — it fails loudly on a dirty/non-empty fixture rather than corrupting it. NOTE: an abort BETWEEN the set and the clear leaves a nonce status; the next run's empty-status precondition then fails loudly (self-detecting, not silent corruption) — so this is self-cleaning on completion but NOT abort-proof. Hermetic — no peer (the avatar leg + paired-peer-observes-change leg are S52). Maps to S8 / B10.
